name: davidlaporte
description: David LaPorte's Claude Code plugins for the davidlaporte.org homelab Innovation Platform and future tools.

plugins.name: innovation-platform
plugins.description: Build and ship apps on the davidlaporte.org Innovation Platform: create an app via the inno-platform MCP server, scaffold a Starlette container under app/ per platform conventions, containerize it, run the security gates locally before pushing, ship through CI/CD, and manage access to a live app.
